nodes.context: Yakuza organization based in Osaka, Japan, designated under Organized Crime Countermeasures Law.
Designated yakuza group based in Osaka Prefecture.

edges.evidence_quote: The Azuma-gumi is one of the two designated yakuza groups based in the Osaka Prefecture , along with the Sakaume-gumi
edges.context: Both are designated yakuza groups in Osaka Prefecture, but no specific relationship is stated.
